notes: Core mechanics mostly work but there's a critical bug: lockTimer is incremented twice per frame (once in gravity block and once unconditionally), causing pieces to lock almost immediately; also the next piece preview uses getRotationBlocks with wrong argument type (string instead of object), and the visible row offset logic (y>=4 check) causes pieces to be invisible while spawning at the top.
Game crashes immediately on start due to a TypeError in the next piece preview, and even if fixed, pieces lock in mid-air after 0.5 seconds due to broken lock delay logic.

Core Tetris is partially present, but the next-piece preview has a JavaScript bug, hard drop does not lock immediately, hidden-row rendering is misaligned, and lock timing/game flow are noticeably flawed.
